category_sources: Official Potassco clingo page says clingo combines gringo and clasp for grounding and solving.
source_facts.description says ASP system to ground and solve logic programs.
display_name_sources: Official Potassco page is titled clingo and gringo; GitHub README is Clingo.
docs_sources: Official Potassco Getting Started page recommends the Potassco guide for clingo.
Official Potassco clingo page includes resources, API references, and links to guides.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/potassco/clingo, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include logic-programming, answer-set-programming, and declarative-programming.
source_facts.description mentions ASP and logic programs.
